facts.what: Incorrect cargo release timing on first pass.
facts.why: Mismatch between stopwatch cue and navigator call.
facts.how: Release initiated 3 seconds late, corrected on pass 2.
facts.narrative: No incident. Second pass successful after quick recalibration and concise cockpit brief.

analysis.content: Root cause: timing ownership not clearly assigned. Contributing factor: high radio traffic during final run-in.

recos.doctrine: Define single timing authority for each drop run.
recos.rh: Coach crew on short, unambiguous challenge-response.
recos.equipements: Test alternate timer placement for better visibility.
recos.soutien: Include timing contingency in mission folder.
recos.entrainement: Repeat dry runs with induced comms saturation.

qwi.advice: Strong adaptation after first error. Keep one owner for timing and maintain sterile cockpit in final 30 seconds.
